creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad This is an incredible new Chinese restaurant with lunch specials from just £8.60 ✨

This is @dandan.restaurant, serving authentic Sichaun and Cantonese cuisine and the flavours are so good! They make fresh hand-pulled noodles and dim sum daily and you can taste the quality 🥟 They also have gorgeous interiors as well as private rooms that you can book!

🔥 Head down to their opening on Sunday 15th March at 1pm to see the traditional lion dance 🦁 and enjoy 40% off ALL the food (15-21 March) and 20% off ALL the food (22-28 March)

Save this and make sure you head down!
📍DanDan Restaurant, Battersea, Moat St, Nine Elms, London, SW11 7EU
✨ 3 minutes to Battersea Power Station, right next to Tian Tian supermarket. 
🗓️ Opening celebration Sunday 15th March, 1pm
🎉 Don’t forget: 40% off the food (15-21 March) and 20% off (22-28 March)

geo_locations: DanDan Restaurant, Battersea, Moat St, Nine Elms, London, SW11 7EU
pinned_places: DanDan Restaurant, Battersea, Moat St, Nine Elms, London, SW11 7EU

transcription.text: Okay so we've heard that there's an incredible new Chinese restaurant that's just opened near Battersea Power Station and if you go right now for their opening, they're doing 40% off the food for the first week and 20% off the food for the second week which is incredible because these flavours are on another level. This is Dan Dan and they specialise in authentic Sichuan and Cantonese cuisine with a range of tasty noodle and rice dishes and I absolutely love their stir-fried vegetable dishes. We got so many to try and they were all incredible and I love their hand-pulled noodles. The prices are also so affordable with their lunch special starting from just £8.60. The interiors are also beautiful and they have a private dining room. Make sure you head down and make the most of that discount. They open on the 15th of March and will even have a lion dance performance that day. Find the exact details in the caption.
